scripts.build:deps: pnpm --filter @embedpdf/engine-core build && pnpm --filter @cloudpdf/admin-api build && pnpm --filter @cloudpdf/admin build && pnpm --filter @cloudpdf/engine build && pnpm --filter @cloudpdf/server build
scripts.dev: pnpm run build:deps && concurrently -k -n api,ui "pnpm run dev:api" "pnpm run dev:ui"
